alternate_names: 株式会社ニッシンシステムサービス

executives.bio: Founded the company in 2002 after inheriting system localization operations from a major foreign enterprise. Leads the company's expansion into new business areas including 3D printing and industrial products.

location.address: 神奈川県厚木市旭町1丁目33-5 本多ビル 5階
神奈川県海老名市本郷4156-11

employees.note: Company maintains a focused team of skilled technicians and support staff

sought_skills: Database experience (Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL)
work_locations: Tokyo metropolitan area (Headquarters and client sites)

organization_notes.philosophy: 「挑戦」(Challenge) - The company motto emphasizes continuous challenge and improvement
organization_notes.name_origin: Derived from '日進月歩' meaning steady daily progress
organization_notes.founding_story: Established by inheriting system and localization operations from a major foreign enterprise
organization_notes.culture: Focus on technical skill development and providing growth opportunities for employees

research_notes: Note: The website nisshin-sys.co.jp belongs to a different Tokyo-based company (株式会社日進システムズ). This profile focuses on the Ebina/Atsugi-based 株式会社ニッシン. The user-specified address (243-0401 海老名市東柏ヶ谷1-18-39) differs from current known locations and may represent a different facility or historical address.
